positive: A highly stylized and intricate sacred geometry mandala centered composition, depicting interconnected celestial bodies, blooming lotus flowers, and abstract geometric patterns. The color palette uses deep indigo, radiant gold, moss green, and creamy white, achieving a strong contrast and ethereal glow. The design should be clean, symmetrical, and highly defined, suitable for a wearable textile print with clear silhouettes and crisp lines. Minimalist yet ornate, illuminated by soft, radiant ambient light, vector illustration style, ultra-detailed, symmetry, high contrast, print-ready, perfect composition.
